strengths: 15+ years across full-stack, embedded, and mobile with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
No Kotlin listed, and Java exposure appears limited and dated (robotics work ~2016-2018)
Limited explicit cloud breadth — AWS CDK shown, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-at-scale specifics beyond self-hosted use

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well above the 6-year bar, strong TypeScript/Node.js and React work, and directly relevant current experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. Engineering-practice signal (TDD, CI/CD, teaching) is excellent. Gaps are around the specific Nest.js framework and current Kotlin/Java usage, plus limited explicit cloud breadth, but these are learnable given the candidate's polyglot history.
